name: gmail-agent
description: Securely interact with Gmail through Auth0 Token Vault. Summarize, classify, read, and draft replies to emails using local Ollama models.

tools.name: list_recent_emails
tools.description: Fetch the most recent emails from the user's Gmail inbox. Returns sender, subject, snippet, and date.

count.description: Number of emails to fetch (default 10, max 20)

tools.name: get_email_content
tools.description: Get the full content of a specific email by ID.

tools.name: summarize_emails
tools.description: Summarize recent emails. Optionally answer a specific question like 'What needs my attention today?' or 'Any emails from my boss?'

query.description: Optional: specific question about the emails

tools.name: classify_emails
tools.description: Classify recent emails into categories: urgent, needs-reply, informational, spam.

tools.name: draft_reply
tools.description: Draft a reply to a specific email. Does NOT send — user must review and approve.

instruction.description: How the user wants to reply, e.g. 'Accept the meeting' or 'Politely decline'

tools.name: agent_query
tools.description: Ask a free-form question about your emails. The agent fetches context and answers using local AI.
